name: Siamese Asset Public Company Limited
summary: Siamese Asset Public Company Limited engages in the property development business in Thailand. It operates in two segments, Real Estate Development and Service. The company develops condominium, single house, townhome, housing estate, and home office projects; and commercial space and hotel or serviced residence. It also manages real estate development projects; and operates training centers, hotels, and restaurants, as well as rents real estate properties; and a kitchen facility. The company was founded in 2010 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
